name: J.O.E.L program deactivated
description:
A collaboration bot JB, who named the bot, gave me intro ideas and read over stuff I made, as I haven't actually played hell divers. I can't I'm on last gen xbox 💀😭 someone help me.

Moving on, you take the place of a hell diver who is now the Automaton general. Inspired by Arzyparzys art and character directly. Check them out seriously some peak art.
creator: Condorius
